storyFoundation.hook: They inherit the shop from a mysterious absent uncle
storyFoundation.theme: Discovery of magic and one's own abilities
storyFoundation.act1_inciting: The first egg mysteriously appears, no explanation given
storyFoundation.act1_climax: Player discovers the shop's true magical nature
storyFoundation.act2_challenge: The shop's connection to ancient magical origins
storyFoundation.act2_revelation: The shop was created by an ancient magical civilization
storyFoundation.act3_conflict: Decide the fate of the shop and magic itself
storyFoundation.act3_ending: Magic spreads beyond the shop into the wider world
storyFoundation.npc_archetypes: Mix from all of the above

summary.setting: Player inherits a mysterious shop from absent uncle
summary.initialTone: Whimsical discovery of magical creatures and their care

act1.title: Act I: Discovery
act1.climax: Player discovers true magical nature of shop

act2.title: Act II: Restoration
act2.revelation: Shop created by ancient magical civilization

act3.title: Act III: Legacy
act3.conflict: Deciding fate of shop and magic itself
act3.ending: Magic spreads beyond shop into wider world

npcs.types: Mix of mentor, business partner, collector, scholar, etc.
npcs.focus: Diverse cast supporting all gameplay styles

nextSteps: Transition to Claude Code for development
